text.light-overlay.config.title: Light Overlay Config
text.light-overlay.config.option.light_l: At what block light should the overlay turn green in the Overworld? Default is 1 for spawn-proofing against most mobs.

At what block light should the overlay turn green in the Nether? Default is 12 for spawn-proofing against (Zombified) Piglins and Blazes.
For Skeletons, set to 14
For Endermen & Wither Skeletons, set to 8
At what block light should the overlay turn green in the Nether? Default is 1 for spawn-proofing against all mobs.
text.light-overlay.config.option.hide_gr: Disables rendering for spots that would normally render green
text.light-overlay.config.option.hide_tr: Disables rendering on transparent blocks. This only includes transparent blocks on which mobs cannot spawn.
text.light-overlay.config.option.show_sp: Show Overlay on Blocks with Special Spawning Conditions
Enables rendering on blocks with special spawning conditions (e.g. Wither Roses which only allow Wither Skeletons to spawn, nothing else)
Opens the GitHub Issues page of this mod
text.light-overlay.config.option.overlay:
Changes the way in which the Light Overlay gets presented. 
- Cross Mode: Renders a cross at each position 
- Carpet Mode: Renders a "carpet" at each position 
- Number Mode: Renders the Light Level as a number
- Marker Mode: Renders a small, high marker at each position
text.light-overlay.config.option.valid_c: The Overlay Color when the Light Level is equal or higher than the Threshold. Defaults to green
text.light-overlay.config.option.invalid: The Overlay Color when the Light Level is less than the Threshold. Defaults to red
text.light-overlay.config.option.scan_ra: The size of the Light Overlay above and below you to display the Light Overlay.
text.light-overlay.config.option.show_wh: Whether to show the overlay when the game is paused.
text.light-overlay.config.option.cylinde: Render the Overlay in a Cylinder shape instead of a cube (Depending on use case, this could improve performance)
text.light-overlay.config.group.experime: Experimental (Don't change unless you know what you're doing!)
text.light-overlay.config.option.chunk_s: How many chunks around the player to render the Light Level. Higher values increase the scanned area but may decrease performance.
text.light-overlay.config.option.max_com: The maximum amount of chunks being computed in a single tick. Lower this if experiencing lags.
text.light-overlay.config.option.scan_ra: How many Chunk Sections (16 blocks high) to render the Light Level vertically away from you. Higher values increase the scanned area but may decrease performance. Lower the normal Scan Range before this as it has a bigger impact.
